ksa_text: Skill in producing data quality reporting for business and governance audiences, translating technical quality metrics into business risk and operational impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality is a primary or secondary domain for the VP Data Platform. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (vp).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.456). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Platform versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Data Quality appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Platform.

decision_rationale: Data Quality skill KSA is within scope for the VP Data Platform at the vp tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
